testsuite.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering

testcase.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering Fine + New requests only PSA and CRWCRT local justice areas
testcase.classname: Fine + New requests only PSA and CRWCRT local justice areas

testcase.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering Fine + Transfer in requests only PSA and CRWCRT local justice areas
testcase.classname: Fine + Transfer in requests only PSA and CRWCRT local justice areas

testcase.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering Conditional Caution + New requests all local justice area types
testcase.classname: Conditional Caution + New requests all local justice area types

testcase.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering Fixed Penalty + New requests all local justice area types (Prosecutors all remain visible)
testcase.classname: Fixed Penalty + New requests all local justice area types (Prosecutors all remain visible)

testcase.name: Manual account creation - Local justice area filtering Fixed Penalty + Transfer in requests all local justice area types (Prosecutors all remain visible)
